query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "liveedit: towards real-time diffusion-based streaming video editing" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on task offloading and resource allocation in Vehicular Edge Computing (VEC) for applications like object detection, which is a distinct domain from the user's question regarding real-time diffusion-based video editing algorithms.
